allow: Bash(node -e "const { TablesDB } = require\('node-appwrite'\); const t = new TablesDB\({}\); console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(t\)\).filter\(n => n !== 'constructor'\).join\('\\n'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const { Account } = require\('node-appwrite'\); const proto = Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Account.prototype\); console.log\(proto.filter\(m => m.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('session'\) || m.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('email'\)\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const { TablesDB } = require\('node-appwrite'\); const proto = Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(TablesDB.prototype\); console.log\(proto\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; data = json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\([m['name'] for m in data.get\('paraminfo', {}\).get\('modules', []\)], indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; data = json.load\(sys.stdin\); modules = data.get\('paraminfo', {}\).get\('querymodules', []\); [print\(m['name']\) for m in modules[:30]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(l['name'], l['id']\) for l in data['data']['leagues']]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('recent:', len\(d['recent']\), 'upcoming:', len\(d['upcoming']\)\); [print\(' -', m['teams'][0]['name'], 'vs', m['teams'][1]['name'], '|', m['tournament']\) for m in d['upcoming'][:3]]")
